---
title: "Agent"
subtitle: Agent Content List
description: |
  Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) 및 Agent 개발 관련 기술의 전체 구현 과정을 다루는 종합 가이드. 
  LangChain & LangGraph을 활용한 RAG 시스템 구축, 문서 로딩, 임베딩, 벡터 저장소, 검색기, 
  그리고 고급 RAG 기법까지 단계별로 학습할 수 있는 실습 중심의 블로그 모음
categories:
  - AI
  - LangChain
  - RAG
  - Agent
  - Cloud
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 12/31/2024
---

## Agent

### Intro

1.  [intro rag](./00-Intro/1.intro_rag.qmd)
2.  [settings](./00-Intro/2-0.settings.qmd)
3.  [settings api issue](./00-Intro/2-1.settings_api_issue.qmd)
4.  [settings LangSmith](./00-Intro/2-2.settings_LangSmith.qmd)
5.  [settings VScode JASON](./00-Intro/2-3.settings_VScode_JASON.qmd)
6.  [LangChain intro](./00-Intro/3-0.LangChain_intro.qmd)

### Basic

1.  [01-OpenAI-APIKey](./01-Basic/01-OpenAI-APIKey.qmd)
2.  [02-OpenAI-LLM](./01-Basic/02-OpenAI-LLM.qmd)
3.  [03-LCEL](./01-Basic/03-LCEL.qmd)
4.  [04-LCEL-Advanced](./01-Basic/04-LCEL-Advanced.qmd)
5.  [05-Runnable](./01-Basic/05-Runnable.qmd)



### Output Parser

1.  [01-PydanticOuputParser](./03-OutputParser/01-PydanticOuputParser.qmd)
2.  [02-CommaSeparatedListOutputParser](./03-OutputParser/02-CommaSeparatedListOutputParser.qmd)
3.  [03-StructuredOutputParser](./03-OutputParser/03-StructuredOutputParser.qmd)
4.  [04-JsonOutputParser](./03-OutputParser/04-JsonOutputParser.qmd)
5.  [05-PandasDataFrameOutputParser](./03-OutputParser/05-PandasDataFrameOutputParser.qmd)
6.  [06-DatetimeOutputParser](./03-OutputParser/06-DatetimeOutputParser.qmd)
7.  [07-EnumOutputParser](./03-OutputParser/07-EnumOutputParser.qmd)
8.  [08-OutputFixingParser](./03-OutputParser/08-OutputFixingParser.qmd)

### Model

1.  [01-Chat-Models](./04-Model/01-chat-models.qmd)
2.  [02-Cache](./04-Model/02-Cache.qmd)
3.  [03-ModelSerialization](./04-Model/03-ModelSerialization.qmd)
4.  [04-TokenUsage](./04-Model/04-TokenUsage.qmd)
5.  [05-Google-Generative-AI](./04-Model/05-Google-Generative-AI.qmd)
6.  [06-HuggingFace-Endpoint](./04-Model/06-HuggingFace-Endpoint.qmd)
7.  [07-HuggingFace-Local](./04-Model/07-HuggingFace-Local.qmd)
8.  [08-Huggingface-Pipelines](./04-Model/08-Huggingface-Pipelines.qmd)
9.  [09-Ollama](./04-Model/09-Ollama.qmd)
10. [10-GPT4ALL](./04-Model/10-GPT4ALL.qmd)
11. [11-Gemini-Video](./04-Model/11-Gemini-Video.qmd)
12. [12-OpenSource-LLMs-2026](./04-Model/12-OpenSource-LLMs-2026.qmd)
13. [13-Paid-LLMs-202602](./04-Model/13.Paid-LLMs-202602.qmd)

### Memory

1.  [01-ConversationBufferMemory](./05-Memory/01-ConversationBufferMemory.qmd)
2.  [02-ConversationBufferWindowMemory](./05-Memory/02-ConversationBufferWindowMemory.qmd)
3.  [03-ConversationTokenBufferMemory](./05-Memory/03-ConversationTokenBufferMemory.qmd)
4.  [04-ConversationEntityMemory](./05-Memory/04-ConversationEntityMemory.qmd)
5.  [05-ConversationKnowledgeGraph](./05-Memory/05-ConversationKnowledgeGraph.qmd)
6.  [06-ConversationSummary](./05-Memory/06-ConversationSummary.qmd)
7.  [07-VectorStoreRetrieverMemory](./05-Memory/07-VectorStoreRetrieverMemory.qmd)
8.  [08-LCEL-add-memory](./05-Memory/08-LCEL-add-memory.qmd)
9.  [09-Memory-using-SQLite](./05-Memory/09-Memory-using-SQLite.qmd)
10. [10-Conversation-With-History](./05-Memory/10-Conversation-With-History.qmd)


## RAG

### Preprocess

#### Document Loader

1.  [00-Document-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/00-Document-Loader.qmd)
2.  [01-PDF-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/01-PDF-Loader.qmd)
3.  [02-HWP-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/02-HWP-Loader.qmd)
4.  [03-CSV-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/03-CSV-Loader.qmd)
5.  [04-Excel-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/04-Excel-Loader.qmd)
6.  [05-Word-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/05-Word-Loader.qmd)
7.  [06-PowerPoint-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/06-PowerPoint-Loader.qmd)
8.  [07-WebBase-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/07-WebBase-Loader.qmd)
9.  [08-TXT-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/08-TXT-Loader.qmd)
10. [09-JSON-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/09-JSON-Loader.qmd)
11. [10-Arxiv-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/10-Arxiv-Loader.qmd)
12. [11-Directory-Loader](./06-DocumentLoader/11-Directory-Loader.qmd)
13. [12-UpstageLayoutAnalysisLoader](./06-DocumentLoader/12-UpstageLayoutAnalysisLoader.qmd)
14. [13-Llamaparser](./06-DocumentLoader/13-Llamaparser.qmd)

#### Text Splitter

1.  [01-CharacterTextSplitter](./07-TextSplitter/01-CharacterTextSplitter.qmd)
2.  [02-RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter](./07-TextSplitter/02-RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter.qmd)
3.  [03-TokenTextSplitter](./07-TextSplitter/03-TokenTextSplitter.qmd)
4.  [04-SemanticChunker](./07-TextSplitter/04-SemanticChunker.qmd)
5.  [05-CodeSplitter](./07-TextSplitter/05-CodeSplitter.qmd)
6.  [06-MarkdownHeaderTextSplitter](./07-TextSplitter/06-MarkdownHeaderTextSplitter.qmd)
7.  [07-HTMLHeaderTextSplitter](./07-TextSplitter/07-HTMLHeaderTextSplitter.qmd)
8.  [08-RecursiveJsonSplitter](./07-TextSplitter/08-RecursiveJsonSplitter.qmd)

#### Embeddings

1.  [01-OpenAIEmbeddings](./08-Embeddings/01-OpenAIEmbeddings.qmd)
2.  [02-CacheBackedEmbeddings](./08-Embeddings/02-CacheBackedEmbeddings.qmd)
3.  [03-HuggingFaceEmbeddings](./08-Embeddings/03-HuggingFaceEmbeddings.qmd)
4.  [04-UpstageEmbeddings](./08-Embeddings/04-UpstageEmbeddings.qmd)
5.  [05-OllamaEmbeddings](./08-Embeddings/05-OllamaEmbeddings.qmd)
6.  [06-llamacpp](./08-Embeddings/06-llamacpp.qmd)
7.  [07-GPT4ALL](./08-Embeddings/07-GPT4ALL.qmd)

#### Vector Store

0.  [00-VectorStore](./09-VectorStore/00-VectorStore.qmd)
1.  [01-Chroma](./09-VectorStore/01-Chroma.qmd)
2.  [02-FAISS](./09-VectorStore/02-FAISS.qmd)
3.  [03-Pinecone](./09-VectorStore/03-Pinecone.qmd)
4.  [04-Azure-AI-Search](./09-VectorStore/04-Azure-AI-Search.qmd)

### Runtime Process

#### Retriever

1.  [01-VectorStoreRetriever](./10-Retriever/01-VectorStoreRetriever.qmd)
2.  [02-ContextualCompressionRetriever](./10-Retriever/02-ContextualCompressionRetriever.qmd)
3.  [03-EnsembleRetriever](./10-Retriever/03-EnsembleRetriever.qmd)
4.  [04-LongContextReorder](./10-Retriever/04-LongContextReorder.qmd)
5.  [05-ParentDocumentRetriever](./10-Retriever/05-ParentDocumentRetriever.qmd)
6.  [06-MultiQueryRetriever](./10-Retriever/06-MultiQueryRetriever.qmd)
7.  [07-MultiVectorRetriever](./10-Retriever/07-MultiVectorRetriever.qmd)
8.  [08-SelfQueryRetriever](./10-Retriever/08-SelfQueryRetriever.qmd)
9.  [09-TimeWeightedVectorStoreRetriever](./10-Retriever/09-TimeWeightedVectorStoreRetriever.qmd)
10. [10-Kiwi-BM25Retriever](./10-Retriever/10-Kiwi-BM25Retriever.qmd)
11. [11-CC-EnsembleRetriever](./10-Retriever/11-CC-EnsembleRetriever.qmd)

#### Reranker

1.  [01-Cross-Encoder-Reranker](./11-Reranker/01-Cross-Encoder-Reranker.qmd)
2.  [02-Cohere-Reranker](./11-Reranker/02-Cohere-Reranker.qmd)
3.  [03-Jina-Reranker](./11-Reranker/03-Jina-Reranker.qmd)
4.  [04-FlashRank-Reranker](./11-Reranker/04-FlashRank-Reranker.qmd)
5.  [05-reranker-ml-dl](./11-Reranker/05-reranker-ml-dl.qmd)

### Prompt Engineering

#### 프롬프트 설계 기초

1.  [06-PromptBasic](./02-Prompt/06-PromptBasic.qmd)
2.  [07-PromptDesign](./02-Prompt/07-PromptDesign-fundamental.qmd)
3.  [08-LLM-limit](./02-Prompt/08-LLM-limit.qmd)
4.  [09-PromptDesign-practical](./02-Prompt/09-PromptDesign-practical.qmd)
5.  [17-OpenAI-생성-파라미터](./02-Prompt/17-PromptAnalytics-genereatior-conditions.qmd)

#### LangChain 프롬프트 도구

1.  [01-PromptTemplate](./02-Prompt/01-PromptTemplate.qmd)
2.  [02-FewShotTemplates](./02-Prompt/02-FewShotTemplates.qmd)
3.  [03-LangChain-Hub](./02-Prompt/03-LangChainHub.qmd)
4.  [04-Personal-Prompts](./02-Prompt/04-PersonalPrompts.qmd)
5.  [05-ChatPromptTemplate](./02-Prompt/05-ChatPromptTemplate.qmd)

#### 프롬프트 분석 (Prompt Analytics)

1.  [10-PromptAnalytics](./02-Prompt/10-PromptAnalytics.qmd)
2.  [11-PromptWritingMethod](./02-Prompt/11-PromptWritingMethod.qmd)
3.  [12-PromptAnalytics-conversation-analysis1](./02-Prompt/12-PromptAnalytics-conversation-analysis1.qmd)
4.  [13-PromptAnalytics-conversation-analysis2](./02-Prompt/13-PromptAnalytics-conversation-analysis2.qmd)
5.  [14-PromptAnalytics-segmentation](./02-Prompt/14-PromptAnalytics-segmentation.qmd)
6.  [15-1-PromptAnalytics-segmentation-strategy](./02-Prompt/15-1-PromptAnalytics-segmentation-strategy.qmd)
7.  [15-2-PromptAnalytics-user-data-strategy](./02-Prompt/15-2-PromptAnalytics-user-data-strategy.qmd)
8.  [15-3-PromptAnalytics-utterance-data-pipeline](./02-Prompt/15-3-PromptAnalytics-utterance-data-pipeline.qmd)
9.  [16-PromptAnalytics-reasoning](./02-Prompt/16-PromptAnalytics-reasoning.qmd)

#### 프롬프팅 기법

1.  [18-PromptWriting-techniques](./02-Prompt/18-PromptWriting-techniques.qmd)
2.  [19-PromptWriting-zeroshot](./02-Prompt/19-PromptWriting-zeroshot.qmd)
3.  [20-PromptWriting-fewshot](./02-Prompt/20-PromptWriting-fewshot.qmd)
4.  [21-PromptWriting-chain-of-thought](./02-Prompt/21-PromptWriting-chain-of-thought.qmd)
5.  [22-PromptWriting-zeroshot-CoT](./02-Prompt/22-PromptWriting-zeroshot-CoT.qmd)
6.  [23-PromptWriting-self-consistency](./02-Prompt/23-PromptWriting-self-consistency.qmd)
7.  [24-PromptWriting-advenced techniques](./02-Prompt/24-PromptWriting-advenced-techniques.qmd)
8.  [25-PromptWriting-knowledge-generation](./02-Prompt/25-PromptWriting-knowledge-generation.qmd)
9.  [26-PromptWriting-prompt-chaining](./02-Prompt/26-PromptWriting-prompt-chaining.qmd)
10. [27-PromptWriting-tree-of-thoughts](./02-Prompt/27-PromptWriting-tree-of-thoughts.qmd)
11. [28-PromptWriting-active-prompting](./02-Prompt/28-PromptWriting-active-prompting.qmd)
12. [29-PromptWriting-rag1](./02-Prompt/29-PromptWriting-rag1.qmd)
13. [30-PromptWriting-APE](./02-Prompt/30-PromptWriting-APE.qmd)
14. [31-PromptWriting-rag2](./02-Prompt/31-PromptWriting-rag2.qmd)
15. [32-PromptWriting-directional-stimulus](./02-Prompt/32-PromptWriting-directional-stimulus.qmd)
16. [33-PromptWriting-ReAct](./02-Prompt/33-PromptWriting-ReAct.qmd)

#### 실전 프롬프트 설계

1.  [34-PromptWriting-PromptGenerator](./02-Prompt/34-PromptWriting-PromptGenerator.qmd)
2.  [35-PromptWriting-PromptAutoCompletion](./02-Prompt/35-PromptWriting-PromptAutoCompletion.qmd)
3.  [36-PromptWriting-SystemPrompt](./02-Prompt/36-PromptWriting-SystemPrompt.qmd)
4.  [37-PromptWriting-SingleFunctionPrompt](./02-Prompt/37-PromptWriting-SingleFunctionPrompt.qmd)
5.  [38-PromptWriting-DomainSpecificPrompt](./02-Prompt/38-PromptWriting-DomainSpecificPrompt.qmd)
6.  [39-PromptWriting-ImageGeneration](./02-Prompt/39-PromptWriting-ImageGeneration.qmd)

#### RAG

1.  [00-RAG-Basic-PDF](./12-RAG/00-RAG-Basic-PDF.qmd)
2.  [01-RAG-Basic-Webloader](./12-RAG/01-RAG-Basic-Webloader.qmd)
3.  [02-RAG-Advanced](./12-RAG/02-RAG-Advanced.qmd)
4.  [03-Conversation-With-History](./12-RAG/03-Conversation-With-History.qmd)
5.  [04-RAPTOR-Long-Context-RAG-CODE](./12-RAG/04-RAPTOR-Long-Context-RAG-CODE.qmd)
6.  [05-RAPTOR-Long-Context-RAG-PDF](./12-RAG/05-RAPTOR-Long-Context-RAG-PDF.qmd)
7.  [08-Web-Summarize-Chain-Of-Density](./12-RAG/08-Web-Summarize-Chain-Of-Density.qmd)
8.  [10-Multi_modal_RAG-GPT-4o](./12-RAG/10-Multi_modal_RAG-GPT-4o.qmd)
9.  [11-RAG-Variants-Comparison](./12-RAG/11-RAG-Variants-Comparison.qmd)
10. [12-Custom-RAG-vs-Agent](./12-RAG/12-Custom-RAG-vs-Agent.qmd)
11. [13-RAG-Orchestration-Roadmap](./12-RAG/13-RAG-Orchestration-Roadmap.qmd)
12. [14-Long-Context-Limits](./12-RAG/14-Long-Context-Limits.qmd)
13. [15-Structured-RAG-Architecture](./12-RAG/15-Structured-RAG-Architecture.qmd)
14. [16-RAG-vs-Long-Context-Decision](./12-RAG/16-RAG-vs-Long-Context-Decision.qmd)

#### Cloud RAG (Azure)

1.  [Azure-RAG-Overview](./13-Cloud-RAG/00-Azure-RAG-Overview.qmd)
1.  [Project Setting](./13-Cloud-RAG/01-Project-Overview.qmd)
1.  [Azure-Blob-Storage](./13-Cloud-RAG/01-Azure-Blob-Storage.qmd)
1.  [Azure-Document-Intelligence](./13-Cloud-RAG/02-Document-Intelligence.qmd)
1.  [Azure-OpenAI-Embeddings](./13-Cloud-RAG/03-Azure-OpenAI-Embeddings-Info.qmd)
1.  [Azure-AI-Search-Integration](./13-Cloud-RAG/04-Azure-AI-Search-Info.qmd)
1.  [LangChain-to-LangGraph](./13-Cloud-RAG/05-LangChain-to-LangGraph.qmd)
1.  [Azure-OpenAI-LLM](./13-Cloud-RAG/06-Azure-OpenAI-LLM.qmd)
1.  [Azure-Functions-Apps](./13-Cloud-RAG/07-Azure-Functions-Apps.qmd)
1.  [Azure-Container-Apps](./13-Cloud-RAG/08-Azure-Container-Apps.qmd)
1.  [End-to-End-Azure-RAG](./13-Cloud-RAG/09-End-to-End-Azure-RAG.qmd)
1.  [CodeBaseAnalyzer](./13-Cloud-RAG/10-CodeBaseAnalyzer.qmd)
1.  [RAG-optimization](./13-Cloud-RAG/12-RAG-optimization.qmd)

> **관련 참조**: Azure 인프라 설정(VM, Blob Storage, AI Search, Document Intelligence)에 대한 상세 내용은 [Engineering - Azure Cloud](../Engineering/index.qmd#azure) 섹션을 참고한다. Agent 시스템 구축을 위한 DevOps 워크플로는 [Engineering - Agent Platform Design](../Engineering/index.qmd#agent-platform-design) 섹션에서 다룬다.

#### LangChain Expression Language

1.  [RunnablePassthrough](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/01-RunnablePassthrough.ipynb)
2.  [Inspect-Runnables](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/02-Inspect-Runnables.ipynb)
3.  [RunnableLambda](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/03-RunnableLambda.ipynb)
4.  [Routing](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/04-Routing.ipynb)
5.  [RunnableParallel](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/05-RunnableParallel.ipynb)
6.  [Configure](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/06-Configure.ipynb)
7.  [ChainDecorator](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/07-ChainDecorator.ipynb)
8.  [RunnableWithMessageHistory](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/08-RunnableWithMessageHistory.ipynb)
9.  [Custom-Generator](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/09-Custom-Generator.ipynb)
10. [Binding](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/10-Binding.ipynb)
11. [Fallbacks](./14-LangChain-Expression-Language/11-Fallbacks.ipynb)

#### Chains

1.  [Summary](./15-Chains/01-Summary.ipynb)
2.  [SQL](./15-Chains/02-SQL.ipynb)
3.  [Structured-Output-Chain](./15-Chains/03-Structured-Output-Chain.ipynb)
4.  [Structured-Data-Chat](./15-Chains/04-Structured-Data-Chat.ipynb)


## Agent Process

1.  [Tools](./16-Agent/01-Tools.qmd)
2.  [Bind-Tools](./16-Agent/02-Bind-Tools.qmd)
3.  [Agent](./16-Agent/03-Agent.qmd)
4.  [Agent-More-LLMs](./16-Agent/04-Agent-More-LLMs.qmd)
5.  [Human-Intervention](./16-Agent/05-Human_Intervention.qmd)
6.  [Agentic-RAG](./16-Agent/06-Agentic-RAG.qmd)
7.  [CSV-Excel-Agent](./16-Agent/07-CSV-Excel-Agent.qmd)
8.  [Agent-Toolkits-File-Management](./16-Agent/08-Agent-Toolkits-File-Management.qmd)
9.  [Agent-Report-With-Image-Generation](./16-Agent/09-Agent-Report-With-Image-Generation.qmd)
10. [Two-Agent-Debate-With-Tools](./16-Agent/10-Two-Agent-Debate-With-Tools.qmd)
11. [React-Agent](./16-Agent/12-React-Agent.qmd)
12. [Plan-Execute-Agent](./16-Agent/13-Plan-Execute-Agent.qmd)
13. [Multi-Agent-System](./16-Agent/14-Multi-Agent-System.qmd)
14. [Multi-Agent](./16-Agent/14-Multi-Agent.qmd)
15. [ReAct Agent: LangChain v1 create_agent](./16-Agent/15-ReAct-Agent-LangChain-v1.qmd)
16. [ReAct Agent와 Playwright 브라우저 자동화](./16-Agent/16-ReAct-Agent-Playwright-Browser.qmd)

### RAG & Agent Evaluation

1.  [Test-Dataset-Generator-RAGAS](./17-Evaluations/01-Test-Dataset-Generator-RAGAS.ipynb)
2.  [Evaluation-Using-RAGAS](./17-Evaluations/02-Evaluation-Using-RAGAS.ipynb)
3.  [Translate-HF-Upload](./17-Evaluations/03-Translate-HF-Upload.ipynb)
4.  [LangSmith-Dataset](./17-Evaluations/04-LangSmith-Dataset.ipynb)
5.  [LangSmith-LLM-as-Judge](./17-Evaluations/05-LangSmith-LLM-as-Judge.ipynb)
6.  [LangSmith-Embedding-Distance-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/06-LangSmith-Embedding-Distance-Evaluation.ipynb)
7.  [LangSmith-Custom-LLM-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/07-LangSmith-Custom-LLM-Evaluation.ipynb)
8.  [LangSmith-Heuristic-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/08-LangSmith-Heuristic-Evaluation.ipynb)
9.  [LangSmith-Compare-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/09-LangSmith-Compare-Evaluation.ipynb)
10. [LangSmith-Summary-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/10-LangSmith-Summary-Evaluation.ipynb)
11. [LangSmith-Groundedness-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/11-LangSmith-Groundedness-Evaluation.ipynb)
12. [LangSmith-Pairwise-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/12-LangSmith-Pairwise-Evaluation.ipynb)
13. [LangSmith-Repeat-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/13-LangSmith-Repeat-Evaluation.ipynb)
14. [LangSmith-Online-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/14-LangSmith-Online-Evaluation.ipynb)
15. [Prompt-Quality-Control](./17-Evaluations/15-Prompt-Qualtiy-Control.qmd)
16. [Prompt-Quality-Control-testRules](./17-Evaluations/16-Prompt-Qualtiy-Control-testRules.qmd)
17. [Prompt-Quality-Control-testMethod](./17-Evaluations/17-Prompt-Qualtiy-Control-testMethod.qmd)
18. [Prompt-Quality-Control-qualititative](./17-Evaluations/18-Prompt-Qualtiy-Control-qualititative.qmd)
19. [Prompt-Quality-Control-quantitative](./17-Evaluations/19-Prompt-Qualtiy-Control-quantitative.qmd)
20. [Prompt-Evaluation-Justification](./17-Evaluations/20-Prompt-Evaluation-Justification.qmd)
21. [Prompt-Evaluation-LLMasJudge](./17-Evaluations/21-Prompt-Evaluation-LLMasJudge.qmd)
22. [Prompt-Evaluation-template](./17-Evaluations/22-Prompt-Evaluation-template.qmd)
23. [LangSmith-CLI-SDK-Automation](./17-Evaluations/23-LangSmith-CLI-SDK-Automation.qmd)
24. [LangSmith-vs-Custom-Evaluation](./17-Evaluations/24-LangSmith-vs-Custom-Evaluation.qmd)
25. [LangSmith-Security-Governance](./17-Evaluations/25-LangSmith-Security-Governance.qmd)
26. [to-be-organized](./17-Evaluations/to-be-organized.qmd)

> **관련 참조**: Agent 평가에서 활용하는 실험 설계 및 통계적 검정 방법론은 [Experimentation](../Experimentation/index.qmd) 섹션에서 체계적으로 다룬다. A/B 테스트를 통한 Agent 성능 비교 실험 설계는 [A/B 테스트의 핵심 메커니즘](../Experimentation/01-ab-test-mechanism.qmd)을 참고한다.

### Personalization

1.  [Agent Segmentation](./22-Personalization/01-agent-segmentation.qmd)
2.  [Agent Personalization](./22-Personalization/02-agent-personalization.qmd)
3.  [Agent Hyperpersonalization](./22-Personalization/03-agent-hyperpersonalization.qmd)

### LangGraph

#### Core Features

0.  [LangGraph-Overview](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/00-LangGraph-Overview.qmd)
1.  [LangGraph-Introduction](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/01-LangGraph-Introduction.qmd)
2.  [LangGraph-ChatBot](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/02-LangGraph-ChatBot.qmd)
3.  [LangGraph-Agent](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/03-LangGraph-Agent.qmd)
4.  [LangGraph-Agent-With-Memory](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/04-LangGraph-Agent-With-Memory.qmd)
5.  [LangGraph-Streaming-Outputs](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/05-LangGraph-Streaming-Outputs.qmd)
6.  [LangGraph-Human-In-the-Loop](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/06-LangGraph-Human-In-the-Loop.qmd)
7.  [LangGraph-Manual-State-Update](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/07-LangGraph-Manual-State-Update.qmd)
8.  [LangGraph-State-Customization](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/08-LangGraph-State-Customization.qmd)
9.  [LangGraph-DeleteMessages](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/09-LangGraph-DeleteMessages.qmd)
10. [LangGraph-ToolNode](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/10-LangGraph-ToolNode.qmd)
11. [LangGraph-Branching](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/11-LangGraph-Branching.qmd)
12. [LangGraph-Add-Conversation-Summary](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/12-LangGraph-Add-Conversation-Summary.qmd)
13. [LangGraph-Subgraph](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/13-LangGraph-Subgraph.qmd)
14. [LangGraph-Subgraph-Transform-State](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/14-LangGraph-Subgraph-Transform-State.qmd)
15. [LangGraph-Streaming-Steps](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/15-LangGraph-Streaming-Steps.qmd)
16. [LangChain-to-LangGraph-Migration](./18-LangGraph/01-Core-Features/16-LangChain-to-LangGraph-Migration.qmd)

#### Structures

1.  [LangGraph-Building-Graphs](./18-LangGraph/02-Structures/01-LangGraph-Building-Graphs.qmd)
2.  [LangGraph-Naive-RAG](./18-LangGraph/02-Structures/02-LangGraph-Naive-RAG.qmd)
3.  [LangGraph-Add-Groundedness-Check](./18-LangGraph/02-Structures/03-LangGraph-Add-Groundedness-Check.qmd)
4.  [LangGraph-Add-Web-Search](./18-LangGraph/02-Structures/04-LangGraph-Add-Web-Search.qmd)
5.  [LangGraph-Add-Query-Rewrite](./18-LangGraph/02-Structures/05-LangGraph-Add-Query-Rewrite.qmd)
6.  [LangGraph-Agentic-RAG](./18-LangGraph/02-Structures/06-LangGraph-Agentic-RAG.qmd)
7.  [LangGraph-Adaptive-RAG](./18-LangGraph/02-Structures/07-LangGraph-Adaptive-RAG.qmd)

#### Use Cases

1.  [LangGraph-Agent-Simulation](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/01-LangGraph-Agent-Simulation.qmd)
2.  [LangGraph-Prompt-Generation](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/02-LangGraph-Prompt-Generation.qmd)
3.  [LangGraph-CRAG](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/03-LangGraph-CRAG.qmd)
4.  [LangGraph-Self-RAG](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/04-LangGraph-Self-RAG.qmd)
5.  [LangGraph-Plan-and-Execute](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/05-LangGraph-Plan-and-Execute.qmd)
6.  [LangGraph-Multi-Agent-Collaboration](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/06-LangGraph-Multi-Agent-Collaboration.qmd)
6-1. [LangGraph-Multi-Agent-Collaboration-llama3](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/06-LangGraph-Multi-Agent-Collaboration-llama3.qmd)
7.  [LangGraph-Multi-Agent-Supervisor](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/07-LangGraph-Multi-Agent-Supervisor.qmd)
8.  [LangGraph-Hierarchial-Agent-Team](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/08-LangGraph-Hierarchial-Agent-Team.qmd)
9.  [LangGraph-SQL-Agent](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/09-LangGraph-SQL-Agent.qmd)
10. [LangGraph-Research-Assistant](./18-LangGraph/03-Use-Cases/10-LangGraph-Research-Assistant.qmd)

### Fine Tuning

1.  [QA-Pair-GPT](./19-FineTuning/01-QA-Pair-GPT.ipynb)
2.  [Unsloth-llama3-FineTuning-alpaca](./19-FineTuning/02_Unsloth_llama3_파인튜닝_alpaca.ipynb)

### Streamlit Applications

1.  [Chat-Template](./20-Streamlit/00-Chat-Template/)
2.  [MyProject](./20-Streamlit/01-MyProject/)
3.  [Email](./20-Streamlit/02-Email/)
4.  [RAG-With-Evaluation](./20-Streamlit/03-RAG-With-Evaluation/)

### GraphRAG

#### Phase 1: 개념
1.  [GraphRAG-ontology](./21-GraphRAG/00.GraphRAG-ontology.qmd)
2.  [GraphRAG-table](./21-GraphRAG/01.GraphRAG-table.qmd)
3.  [GraphRAG-metadata-approach](./21-GraphRAG/02.GraphRAG-metadata-approach.qmd)
4.  [온톨로지 개론 (Governance)](../Governance/9-0.ontology_overview.qmd)
5.  [온톨로지와 메타데이터 저장소 설계 (Governance)](../Governance/9-1.metadata_ontology.qmd)

#### Phase 2: 환경 설정
4.  [GraphRAG-setup](./21-GraphRAG/03.GraphRAG-setup.qmd)

#### Phase 3: 핵심 컴포넌트
5.  [GraphRAG-node-edge](./21-GraphRAG/04.GraphRAG-node-edge.qmd)
6.  [GraphRAG-strategies](./21-GraphRAG/05.GraphRAG-strategies.qmd)

#### Phase 4: 실무 통합
7.  [GraphRAG-adapters](./21-GraphRAG/06.GraphRAG-adapters.qmd)
8.  [GraphRAG-transformers](./21-GraphRAG/07.GraphRAG-transformers.qmd)

#### Phase 5: 실전 예제
9.  [GraphRAG-movie-reviews](./21-GraphRAG/08.GraphRAG-movie-reviews.qmd)
10. [GraphRAG-code-generation](./21-GraphRAG/09.GraphRAG-code-generation.qmd)
11. [GraphRAG-lazy](./21-GraphRAG/10.GraphRAG-lazy.qmd)
12. [GraphRAG-multihop](./21-GraphRAG/11.GraphRAG-multihop.qmd)

#### Phase 6: 심화
13. [GraphRAG-document](./21-GraphRAG/12.GraphRAG-document.qmd)
14. [GraphRAG-evaluation](./21-GraphRAG/13.GraphRAG-evaluation.qmd)
15. [GraphRAG-production](./21-GraphRAG/14.GraphRAG-production.qmd)

#### Phase 7: 응용
16. [GraphRAG-code-analyzer-architecture](./21-GraphRAG/15.GraphRAG-code-analyzer-architecture.qmd)
17. [범용 코드베이스 분석기 실현 가능성](./21-GraphRAG/16.GraphRAG-universal-code-analyzer-feasibility.qmd)

#### Neo4j GraphRAG

##### Phase 1: 개념 & 환경
1.  [Neo4j-overview](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/00.neo4j-graphrag-overview.qmd)
2.  [Neo4j-setup](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/01.neo4j-setup.qmd)

##### Phase 2: 그래프 구축
3.  [Neo4j-cypher-basics](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/02.neo4j-cypher-basics.qmd)
4.  [Neo4j-knowledge-graph-construction](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/03.neo4j-knowledge-graph-construction.qmd)

##### Phase 3: 검색
5.  [Neo4j-vector-index](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/04.neo4j-vector-index.qmd)
6.  [Neo4j-hybrid-retriever](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/05.neo4j-hybrid-retriever.qmd)

##### Phase 4: GDS 그래프 분석
7.  [Neo4j-gds-community](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/06.neo4j-gds-community.qmd)
8.  [Neo4j-gds-pagerank](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/07.neo4j-gds-pagerank.qmd)

##### Phase 5: Full GraphRAG
9.  [Neo4j-microsoft-graphrag](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/08.neo4j-microsoft-graphrag.qmd)
10. [Neo4j-graphrag-qa](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/09.neo4j-graphrag-qa.qmd)

##### Phase 6: 평가
11. [Neo4j-graphrag-evaluation](./21-GraphRAG/neo4j/10.neo4j-graphrag-evaluation.qmd)

### Agent Architecture

#### Agent 설계 패턴

1.  [Skill-based Agent Pattern](./24-Agent-Architecture/01-skill-based-agent-pattern.qmd)
2.  [Context Management](./24-Agent-Architecture/02-context-management.qmd)
3.  [Hybrid RAG Skill](./24-Agent-Architecture/03-hybrid-rag-skill.qmd)
4.  [Claude Code Context Strategy](./24-Agent-Architecture/04-claude-code-context-strategy.qmd)
5.  [Multi-Agent Design Patterns](./24-Agent-Architecture/05-multi-agent-design-patterns.qmd)
6.  [Agent Tech Stack Evolution](./24-Agent-Architecture/06-agent-tech-stack-evolution.qmd)

#### 시스템 프롬프트 설계

1.  [시스템 프롬프트 분해 6단계](./24-Agent-Architecture/09-system-prompt-decomposition-6steps.qmd)
2.  [시스템 프롬프트 유형 분류와 혼합 설계](./24-Agent-Architecture/10-system-prompt-types-and-layered-routing.qmd)
3.  [프롬프트 설계와 SW 설계의 구조적 대응](./24-Agent-Architecture/11-prompt-design-vs-sw-design.qmd)
4.  [어텐션 희석과 2-Pass 워크플로우](./24-Agent-Architecture/12-attention-dilution-and-2pass-workflow.qmd)
5.  [프롬프트 길이와 구조 설계](./24-Agent-Architecture/20-prompt-length-and-structure.qmd)
6.  [스킬 역분석: Agent용 시스템 프롬프트 작성 원리](./24-Agent-Architecture/19-agent-skill-prompt-analysis.qmd)
7.  [시스템 프롬프트 평가 — AGENT_GUIDE.md 사례 분석](./24-Agent-Architecture/22-system-prompt-evaluation.qmd)
8.  [LLM 지시 준수 메커니즘 — 에이전트가 규칙을 뭉개는 이유](./24-Agent-Architecture/24-llm-instruction-compliance-mechanisms.qmd)
9.  [시스템 프롬프트 동적 주입 아키텍처](./24-Agent-Architecture/25-system-prompt-dynamic-injection-architecture.qmd)

#### 스킬 설계와 생태계

1.  [Agent 스킬 설계와 생성](./24-Agent-Architecture/14-skill-design-and-creation.qmd)
2.  [SKILL.md 명세와 작성법](./24-Agent-Architecture/16-skill-md-specification.qmd)
3.  [스킬 라우팅의 확장성과 한계](./24-Agent-Architecture/18-skill-routing-scalability-and-limits.qmd)
4.  [스킬 기반 프롬프트 아키텍처 실전 적용](./24-Agent-Architecture/21-skill-prompt-architecture-practice.qmd)
5.  [스킬 패턴의 실전 적용: 블로그 지식 관리 시스템](./24-Agent-Architecture/07-skill-pattern-applied-blog-knowledge-system.qmd)
6.  [코드베이스 분석 Agent의 스킬 설계](./24-Agent-Architecture/13-codebase-analyzer-skill-design.qmd)
7.  [MCP 기반 도구 통합](./24-Agent-Architecture/15-mcp-tool-integration.qmd)
8.  [AI Coding Assistant의 SW Tool SDK 명세](./24-Agent-Architecture/26-sw-tool-sdk-specification.qmd)
9.  [자체 개발 Agent에 Claude·Copilot 도구 연결하기](./24-Agent-Architecture/27-connect-claude-copilot-tools-to-custom-agent.qmd)
10. [Claude·Copilot 도구 생태계에 커스텀 도구 추가하기](./24-Agent-Architecture/28-custom-tool-development-and-registration.qmd)
11. [GitHub Copilot CLI SW Tool 명세와 Claude Code 대조 분석](./24-Agent-Architecture/29-github-copilot-cli-tool-specification.qmd)

#### 실전 사례

1.  [Codebase Analyzer Agent: Architecture 비교](./24-Agent-Architecture/08-codebase-analyzer-architecture-comparison.qmd)
2.  [code-review-graph: 로컬 지식 그래프 기반 토큰 최적화](./24-Agent-Architecture/17-code-review-graph-token-optimization.qmd)
3.  [Multi-Repo 코드베이스 분석 Agent 설계](./24-Agent-Architecture/23-multi-repo-agent-architecture.qmd)

### Segmentation & Personalization

1.  [Agent User Segmentation](./22-Personalization/01-agent-segmentation.qmd)
2.  [Agent Personalization](./22-Personalization/02-agent-personalization.qmd)
3.  [Agent Hyperpersonalization](./22-Personalization/03-agent-hyperpersonalization.qmd)

## References

- [GitHub-https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain)
- [Documentation-https://python.langchain.com/](https://python.langchain.com/)
- [Academy-https://academy.langchain.com/](https://academy.langchain.com/)
- [API Reference-https://python.langchain.com/api_reference/](https://python.langchain.com/api_reference/)
- [GitHub-https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph)
- [Documentation-https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/](https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/)
- [LangChain OpenTutorial-https://github.com/LangChain-OpenTutorial/LangChain-OpenTutorial](https://github.com/LangChain-OpenTutorial/LangChain-OpenTutorial)
- [Experiments-https://github.com/daveebbelaar/langchain-experiments](https://github.com/daveebbelaar/langchain-experiments)
- [Tutorials-https://github.com/gkamradt/langchain-tutorials](https://github.com/gkamradt/langchain-tutorials)
- [RAG Overview - Azure AI Search-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/search/retrieval-augmented-generation-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/search/retrieval-augmented-generation-overview)
- [Advanced RAG Systems-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/developer/ai/advanced-retrieval-augmented-generation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/developer/ai/advanced-retrieval-augmented-generation)
- [RAG in Azure AI Foundry-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-foundry/concepts/retrieval-augmented-generation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-foundry/concepts/retrieval-augmented-generation)
- [RAG with Document Intelligence-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/document-intelligence/concept/retrieval-augmented-generation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/document-intelligence/concept/retrieval-augmented-generation)
- [RAG with Machine Learning Prompt Flow-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/machine-learning/concept-retrieval-augmented-generation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/machine-learning/concept-retrieval-augmented-generation)
- [RAG on Databricks-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/databricks/generative-ai/retrieval-augmented-generation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/databricks/generative-ai/retrieval-augmented-generation)
- [RAG Evaluators-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-foundry/concepts/evaluation-evaluators/rag-evaluators](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-foundry/concepts/evaluation-evaluators/rag-evaluators)
- [RAG with Content Understanding-https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/content-understanding/tutorial/build-rag-solution](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/content-understanding/tutorial/build-rag-solution)
- [GPT-RAG Enterprise Solution-https://github.com/Azure/GPT-RAG](https://github.com/Azure/GPT-RAG)
- [LangChain 한국어 튜토리얼-https://github.com/teddylee777/langchain-kr](https://github.com/teddylee777/langchain-kr) - Lee, T.
- [테디노트 YouTube-https://www.youtube.com/c/@teddynote](https://www.youtube.com/c/@teddynote) - Lee, T.
- [데이터 분석 블로그-https://teddylee777.github.io](https://teddylee777.github.io) - Lee, T.
- [테디노트-https://wikidocs.net](https://wikidocs.net) - Lee, T.
